query.original: Do you add your proficiency bonus to every saving throw?
query.used: Do you add your proficiency bonus to every saving throw?

retrieved_nodes.preview: In Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition, you do not add your proficiency bonus to every saving throw. Instead, you only add your proficiency bonus to saving throws for which your character has proficiency.

answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules that you add your proficiency bonus to every saving throw. Instead, you only add your proficiency bonus to saving throws for which your character has proficiency.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer is fully correct and directly addresses the user query, clearly stating that the proficiency bonus is only added to saving throws for which the character has proficiency. It aligns perfectly with the reference answer.
